signals.headline: VP JD Vance Rallies in Georgia, Urges GOP Unity for 2026 Midterms** | NO | MED confidence[2][3]
signals.raw:
VP JD Vance Rallies in Georgia, Urges GOP Unity for 2026 Midterms** | NO | MED confidence[2][3]

Vance headlined a Turning Point USA event in Athens, GA, emphasizing Republican consolidation to win tight midterm races (e.g., House by 20-30 seats), but the rally saw low attendance and some frustration among young conservatives over Trump's unrelated feuds[2][3].
